CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Continued To Dec-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Plaintiff'S Motion To Confirm The Sale Of Real Property.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing to Confirm the Sale of Real Property Pursuant to CCP Section 873.720, et seq.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Maria A. Yuen, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Daniel Chin & Barbara Chin, who were not present at today's hearing.
John O'Rielly, Esq. appeared for defendant Donald Chin, who was not present at the hearing.
Michael Keenan, the Court Appointed Referee, was placed under oath and examined.
Gerald McCahill was present in pro per and placed under oath.
Default was entered against fourth party and fourth co-owner Dale Chin on 12/26/07.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court finds that all notices required by law were given, and good reason existed for the sale of the property commonly known and described as 141 - 27th Street, San Francisco, CA 94110. The sale was legally made and fairly conducted, and the confirmed sale price is not disproportionate to the value of the Property. An offer exceeding the amount bid by the percentages set forth in CCP Section 873.740 was not obtained in open Court. The sale of the Property legally described in Exhibit A of the Order Confirming Sale of Real Property, is confirmed to Gerald McCahill.

Order Confirming Sale of Real Property Pursuant ot CCP Section 873.720 was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Continued To Nov-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Continued To Apr-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Interlocutory Judgment And Order For Apointment Of Referee
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, for appllication for interlocutory judgment and order for appointment of referee.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jonathan Newman, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Daniel Chin, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by plaintiff Barbara Chin.
James O'Rielly, Esq. appeared for defendant Donald Chin, who was not present.
No appearance by defendant Dale Chin, whose default was entered on 12/26/07.

Pursuant to agreement of the parties Daniel Chin, Barbara Chin & Donald Chin, and good cause appearing, the Court grants the request for interlocutory judgment and order for appointment of referee.

Request to vacate Case Management Conference set for March 7, 2007 is granted.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
